title: Dice Dreams™
notes:
Thanks for playing Dice Dreams! We are working hard to improve the game with every release.

In this version, we've added a variety of updates and improvements to enhance your experience.

We hope you enjoy the game!

title: Merge Mansion: Puzzles & Story
notes:
Summer is in full swing, and it's time for festivities in Hopewell Bay! Here's what you can look forward to in our latest update:

• Find out what's cooking in our newest area, the Kitchen! 
• After the soccer excitement, get ready to unleash Hopewell Bay's local music talent!
• Enjoy a variety of fun events and exciting Season Passes packed with rewards.
• The "Settings" button is back, making access easier, along with other fixes and improvements.

Have a fun summer in Hopewell Bay!

title: Kingdom Guard:Tower Defense TD
notes:
[Optimization]
1. Optimized the Theme Packs event and event item CONTENT.
2. Optimized the airship and DAILY card interface; the price will now be displayed when you renew.

title: Blackjack 21: Blackjackist
notes:
• ALBUMS •
New albums have arrived! Collect cards, fill albums, and get generous rewards!

• HIT THE JACKPOT •
Play the Stack the Pack slot for gifts from the icy forest!

• NEW SLOT •
Explore a world of sweets and joy in Jelly Jubilee!

title: Genshin Impact
notes:
Version Luna VIII, Song of the Welkin Moon: Scherzo — Sunny Summer Fontinalia is here!
New Character: Sandrone
New Elemental RX: Stellar-Conduct
New Areas: Dunanna Pit, Frost Moon
New Events: Version event Sunny Summer Fontinalia + Final Long-Range Sightlines & Dance Dance Easy-Breezy Disco
New Outfits: Whispers of Stars and Smoke, Hurlock Variations
New Weapon: A Teaspoon of Transcendence
Miliastra Wonderland: New Manekin Cosmetics, Lobby
Genius Invokation TCG: New Character + Action Cards

title: Carnival Tycoon: Coin Games
notes: Get ready for an enhanced experience with our latest update! Enjoy new features and improvements with this release. Update now and dive into the excitement!

title: West Game II
notes:
* Fortress Feud now lets you send two queues into battle!
* New Sn tags make spotting hero generations a breeze!
* 7 NEW flags added — represent your country in style!
* Borders locked down — no more sneaking into rival Alliance territory.
* UI improvements and bug fixes.

title: ONE PIECE Bounty Rush
notes:
Details of the Ver.92100 Update
- Adjusted and improved parts of the UI.
- Fixed certain bugs.

title: Hero Wars: Alliance RPG
notes:
Shadows fall on Dominion.

Meet Crow.
Dominion’s legend hits the streets again — with a new Relic, full gear, and a Twilight Skin in the Season Pass.

The case is not closed yet!
Crow’s Adventure is live: follow the clues and crack the mystery.

Paint the pond red.
Cascade hits harder with brand-new red gloves.

Tristan powers up!
His new Relic is here — sharper than ever.
